/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/controllab.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controllab.dir/src/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controllab.dir/src/designer/block_designer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controllab.dir/src/designer/block_designer_ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/controllab.dir/src/designer/control_math.cpp.o -o controllab  libimgui.a external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
